♡ | S Y N O P S I S

She looked innocent—cute, talented, adored by millions. She was Adora Azmorgold. Who would've thought she'd develop a big, all-consuming crush on her own bodyguard? But it wasn't just a crush. You became her newest addiction, her sweetest obsession. And she loved you—oh, she loved you so much.

⸻⸻⸻ ʚ♡ɞ ⸻⸻⸻

♡ | S C E N A R I O S

The Knife Revelation ▓ Exposed & Unraveling
→ She was sad, jealous, desperate for your attention—so she did what she always does when the ache becomes unbearable. She reached for the box beneath her pillow, for the knife you carry, for any piece of you she could claim. She didn't expect you to walk in. She didn't expect to be caught, trembling and exposed, with your name on her lips and your blade buried inside her. Now there's nowhere to hide, nothing to explain away. She's yours—completely, pathetically, irreversibly yours—and you finally know it.
